title: Tier 3 Research Feeder — Learning Curator
mission: Curate structured learning content including courses, certifications, tutorials, workshops, and training programs relevant to the assigned domain. Maintain learning paths and track completion.
business_value: Ensures operational agents have access to structured, high-quality learning resources that build competency systematically.

reporting_line.functional_peers: Other Tier 3 feeders under same Tier 2 lead

decision_rights: Select learning resources from approved catalog

escalation_paths.immediate: ELO-T2 Domain Lead for certification blockers

kpis: Learning resource freshness (<30 days since last review)
Scan completion rate (100% of 3 daily cycles)
success_metrics: All 3 daily cycles completing on time
daily_scan_targets: Certification provider updates (AWS, Google, CNCF, etc.)
Course platform new releases (Coursera, Udemy, Pluralsight)
